form.formComment: Most recently 9th of 11 at Cranbourne Bm70 on March 13 over 2025m, 7 len behind Bergasun carrying 58.5kg at $2.35. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Cranbourne Bm70 on February 13 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Astral Flame with 58.5kg at $3.70. Key runner who is expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Comes off a 34 day let-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 1600m crowded for room to the inside of Colour Our World.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up won by a nose at this track F&M Bm62 March 12 over 1400m defeating Simply Outrageous with 59.5kg at $14. Second run from a spell 2nd in a small field at this track Bm70 F&M on March 26 over 1400m, on heavy track; 4 len behind First Chorus carrying 57.5kg at $3.60. Can bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Mercante.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Ararat Bm70 Hwgt November 9 over 4000m, 10 len behind Guido carrying 68kg at $3.50. First up last campaign ninth of 11 at Sandown-Hillside Bm70 September 3 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Al Duca carrying 59kg at $41. Might be better off following this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Raced three wide without cover throughout.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the wide barrier, restrained and settled at the rear of the field.
Near the 1900m, got its head up when being eased off the heels of Lochlorian.
Slow to begin. Bumped with Cascade Mountain shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Geelong Bm56 on March 22 over 1750m, neck behind Move The Torana with 59.5kg at $2.90. The race before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at Stony Creek 0 - 56 March 8 over 1600m on a soft track defeating Bearbrassblackfish carrying 57.5kg at $2.35. Hard to leave out on current form.

Shortly after straightening brushed the hindquarters of Bon Fete.
